title: dalbergia albiflora subsp. albiflora
intro: Dalbergia albiflora subsp. albiflora is a plant species of the genus Dalbergia, a group of flowering plants in the pea family Fabaceae. It is also known as the 'White Flower Dalbergia'. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities, which are thought to contribute to its potential health benefits, such as reducing pain and inflammation, as well as protecting against cell damage and oxidative stress. Traditionally, the plant is prepared in various herbal preparations, including teas and infusions, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
